# stacklet_sso_group (Resource)

Manages an SSO group.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "stacklet_sso_group" "example" {
  name = "example"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name identifying the group in the external SSO provider.

### Optional

- `display_name` (String) The display name of the SSO group.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The GraphQL Node ID of the SSO group.
- `role_assignment_principal` (String) An opaque principal identifier for role assignments. Use this value when creating role assignments.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = stacklet_sso_group.example
  id = "$name"
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import stacklet_group.example $name
```
